features.name: struct aggregate assignment from expression result
features.description: Code should include a struct aggregate assignment where the struct is created from an expression result and then immediately used in another expression

features.name: struct field extraction to individual wires
features.description: Code should include a struct variable whose fields are extracted to individual wires in a single operation

features.name: struct creation used directly in output
features.description: Code should include a struct created inline and used directly in an output expression without intermediate storage
